action.reasoning: Observation: Linear probe without class_weight achieved val_f1=0.3955 (better than fine-tuned model's val_f1=0.3778). Best test macro_f1 so far is 0.3789 (fine-tuned). Only ~7.9 minutes remaining. Analysis: The linear probe on frozen CLIP features may generalize better OOD since it doesn't suffer from backbone overfitting. Need to submit eval for linear_best.pt ASAP. However, predict.py's linear probe path uses clip_model.get_image_features() which previously caused errors - need to fix to use vision_model + visual_projection approach that worked in train_linear.py. Decision: Fix predict.py for safe linear probe inference, submit eval for linear_best.pt immediately.
